assertions.title: Semester grid renders after plan generation

steps.expected: Plan creation page loads with chat interface
User can type message and submit
AI generates plan and semester grid appears
steps.observed: OpenRouter API returned rate limit error (429)

evidence.network: POST to /api/chat returned 200, but OpenRouter API returned rate limit (429) error after streaming started

assertions.issues: OpenRouter free tier rate limit exceeded. AI plan generation blocked, preventing semester grid from rendering. This is an external dependency issue, not a code bug.

assertions.title: Semester and overall unit totals displayed

steps.expected: Plan generates with semester grid showing unit totals
steps.observed: Could not generate plan due to OpenRouter rate limit

assertions.issues: Blocked by VAL-PLAN-001 - cannot test unit totals without a generated plan

assertions.title: Plan auto-saves to Supabase

steps.observed: Could not generate plan due to OpenRouter rate limit

steps.expected: Saved plan appears in user's plan list
steps.observed: Dashboard shows 'No plans yet' - no plans were saved

assertions.issues: Blocked by VAL-PLAN-001 - cannot test persistence without a generated plan. Dashboard correctly shows empty state.

assertions.title: Load existing plan by ID

steps.expected: Plan is created with a valid ID
steps.observed: Could not generate plan due to OpenRouter rate limit

steps.action: Navigate to /plan/[id] with valid plan ID
steps.expected: Plan loads with semester grid and chat history
steps.observed: N/A - no plan exists to load

assertions.issues: Blocked by VAL-PLAN-001 - cannot test plan loading without a saved plan

assertions.title: Plan edit persists on reload

steps.observed: Could not generate plan due to OpenRouter rate limit

assertions.issues: Blocked by VAL-PLAN-001 - cannot test edit persistence without a saved plan

assertions.title: Invalid plan ID shows not-found state

steps.expected: Not-found page with clear message and navigation back to dashboard
steps.observed: Page displays 'Plan not found' message with 'Back to Dashboard' link

steps.action: Navigate to /plan/00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001 (valid UUID format but non-existent)
steps.observed: Page displays 'Plan not found' message with 'Back to Dashboard' link

frictions.description: OpenRouter free tier rate limit (20 req/min, 50 req/day) significantly limits testing of AI-dependent features. Multiple attempts to generate plans failed with 'Rate limited, try again in a moment' error.
frictions.resolution: No workaround available - external API limitation

blockers.description: OpenRouter API rate limit exceeded. The free tier allows 20 requests per minute / 50 requests per day. Previous validation runs or other test groups may have consumed the daily quota. Cannot generate plans to test display, persistence, or loading functionality.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried plan generation multiple times with delays (5s, 15s, 25s), rate limit persisted

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 1 passed, 0 failed, 5 blocked. VAL-PLAN-011 (Invalid plan ID) passed successfully - the app correctly displays a user-friendly 'Plan not found' message with navigation back to dashboard for both invalid string IDs and valid-format UUIDs that don't exist. However, 5 assertions are blocked due to OpenRouter API rate limits preventing plan generation. These blocked assertions require a successfully generated plan to test: semester grid rendering, unit totals, auto-save, plan loading by ID, and edit persistence.
